name: Togglz
description: Open-source Java feature toggle library implementing the Feature Toggles pattern, using Java enums for type-safe flag definitions. Apache 2.0 licensed.

seo.title: Togglz — Feature Flags / Remote Config
seo.meta_description: Togglz: Open-source Java feature toggle library implementing the Feature Toggles pattern, using Java enums for type-safe flag definitions. Apache 2.0 licensed.

when_to_use: Type-safe Java feature toggles using enum definitions
Multiple activation strategies including gradual rollout
Database-backed flag persistence with Spring Boot auto-config
Web console for runtime flag management in Java apps

pros: Type-safe Java enums for flag definitions
Admin console and many storage backends
cons: Less innovation recently vs new entrants
review.verdict: Safe, conservative choice for Java teams; consider OpenFeature-based options if you want language portability.
review.best_for: JVM monoliths wanting simple, type-safe in-process flags
review.not_for: Polyglot systems or experimentation-heavy product teams
